reviews.review_description:
BlockView is a soothing yet stimulating gem—a cozy puzzle paradise where your brain gets a gentle workout without the stress. You’ll match multiple perspectives of simple shapes (squares, rectangles) in a tranquil, meditative space, turning spatial reasoning into a relaxing brain teaser.
The versatility is impressive—play with controllers, hand tracking, or even switch between VR and MR modes. Plus, curate your own soundtrack to match your mood! Whether you’re unwinding after a long day or challenging your mind, BlockView offers a unique, original experience that’s as calming as it is clever.
A hidden delight for puzzle lovers and VR explorers alike. Your brain will thank you. 🧠🌿

Calm, relaxing, no time pressure. Perfect for VR unwind sessions.
10/10 recommend

developer_response.body:
Thanks!
Calm, no pressure, and perfect to unwind was exactly what I was aiming for. Really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: I was looking for a calm brain-teaser after getting tired of complex games, and this is perfect. It looked simple at first, but I was wrong! The later levels really test your spatial awareness. lol It feels so satisfying to clear each stage. I'm looking forward to seeing more stages added!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words!
I’m really happy to hear that BlockView felt calm at first but still challenged your spatial thinking as you progressed. Thanks for playing and for the encouragement!

reviews.review_title: A Refreshing Brain Workout From Simple
reviews.review_description: This puzzle game truly makes my brain feel younger and more flexible! It starts off easy enough for anyone to pick up, but the difficulty scales so perfectly that I found myself completely immersed. I initially expected a simple time-killer, but I was blown away by its depth and how it challenges your intellect. I came in for a quick session and ended up giving my brain a full workout. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a real mental challenge!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind words!
It’s great to hear that what started as a quick try turned into a real brain workout
Really appreciate the recommendation!
